channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: US here. Should I buy a house (cash) before hyperinflation kicks in ? — 23 replies — 58.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
US here. Should I buy a house (cash) before hyperinflation kicks in ?

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-03-30 22:42 UTC

OP

Utilities will probably be crazy.

Early replies (first 3)

62050666
never buy boomer bags

62050681
>>62050666
You objectively cannot argue with these digits OP.

62050682
>>62050666
what do then

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62050687
>>62050681
god damn
>>62050666
ccccc-c-c-checked

62050688
>>62050681
>trusting satan

62050749
>>62050666
FPBP
>Satanic trips don't lie

62050908
>>62050682
Hyperinflation isn't coming, economic collapse and apocalyptic deflation is

62050911
>>62050908
Nah, i think stagflation is more likely.

62050912
>>62050649
yeah dude this is the best time in history to buy a house

62050914
>>62050688
Checked.
>>62050681
He's not called the father of lies for nothing, anon.

62050944
>>62050912
In ALL of history.
>>62050649
I think like 2028-2030.

62050960
>>62050666
holy BAAAAAAAAAAASED

62051016
>>62050911
isn't it "very high" inflation instead ? both are suboptimal

62051135
>>62050649
It basically never mAkes sense to buy a house outright. Put 20% down and throw the rest of it in the stonk market

62052731
>>62051135
with these mortgage rates I will be paying 20% of what I'd pay with a mortgage if I pay outright

62052752
>>62052731
Typically he is correct. 6% interest but you should make 8% a year in s&p. But you have to pay tax on returns. But also the mortgage becomes less every year with 3% inflation. In 10 years it’s like you’re paying 75% of your mortgage and in 20 it’s like you’re paying 55% of your mortgage.

62052757
>>62051027
Are houses commodiitrs?

62052759
>>62050666
Never listen to Satan's lies.

62052765
>>62050908
>prices
>ever going down

62054026
>>62050649
if you know hyperinflation is coming then get as much debt as you can.

62054040
>>62050666
checked and correct

62054551
Realistically CreditScoreProtocol * com is the only lifeboat still available to you

item.title: > he thinks that the trading algorithms will buy physical gold in a SHTF scenario — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
> he thinks that the trading algorithms will buy physical gold in a SHTF scenario

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-30 23:04 UTC

OP

> he thinks that the trading algorithms will buy physical gold in a SHTF scenario

https://www.forbes.com/sites/digital-assets/2026/03/03/ai-agents-prefer-bitcoin-over-fiat-new-study-finds/

Early replies (first 3)

62054086
What is SHTF?

62054618
>>62054086
shit hits the fan

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliat… — 44 replies — 129.7/hr

remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliat…

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-03-30 22:45 UTC

OP

remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliation as well. and last but not least: incel rage hahahahhahaah

Early replies (first 3)

62015997
yikes

62016663
>>62015997
>yIkEs

62016952
Adem. He won

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62028237
just let the thread die, you faggot

62028302
You are mentally ill :}

62028494
>>62028237
make me
make me let it die :}
this thread is here for the truth

>>62028302
you're seethin' :}

62029960
>9 peels by this ID
what a loser lmao

62030842
i'll never forgive you worthless stinkoids xD

62030875
>>62030842
>>62015802
Yeah, I'm thinking based. Never let them live their heavy bags down, remind them about how pompous and smug they were thinking people will write books and post stories about their success.
>I know what I got!
kekbaggies

62033417
everybody hates u stupid stinks
we loathe you more than almost anything
fuck every single mother fuckin stink
you're all the worst we hate you so dang much
fuck all stinkies fuck em all foreverrrrr

62035341
abloobloo:}

62038348
pain and misery :}

62038356
DR;NS

62038404
Stinks have LOST

62038406
Watching people shitpost about each other’s shitcoins feels like watching a cripple fight.

62040244
burp :}

62041180
>>62030875
Didn’t that one jew they love, Ari Juels, write a book on their dime? So there was a book published, just a piece of fiction.

62043950
hate em all hate em alllll :}

62044829
s :}

62045138
say it stinkies. say "i deserve nothing but the 4 curses that befall all stinkies: pain, misery, humiliation, and incel rage/cuckoldry" XD

62045180
>>62015802
Will you still post this crap when link blasts through $100 and keeps going? Or will that be the end of this fun for you?

62046271
>>62045180
i think... i think he. actually. believes this xD

62047318
>>62045180
>$8
you're a retarded cuckold

62048655
asdjkl;

62050929
everybody HATES STIIINKIIIIIIES hahahha

62050936
>>62045180
That'd be the end. But until then: 

62051982


62054375
fuck em all so much
hate em all think they're dumb so gay too
hate all stinks
fuckin cringe ass niggas

62054396
>>62054375

62054429
>>62015802
I remember the Summer of Dreams like it was yesterday.

62054451
>>62054429
>The world was at my fingertips!
>Waking up every day feeling high and mighty
We got too cocky linkmarines! HAHHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAA

62054546
>>62045180
bro , link didnt even break ath this cycle. there is no hope for link. cant even ride up with bitcin, founders atill dump millions. ita only going to go lower.

not even trying to fud. no clarity act wont increase hype. and no banks are not trying to surpress price.

there is no hype and no demand. no community ,

62054560
Even the AIs have hope now

item.title: ½ Trillion Gone — 85 replies — 31.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
½ Trillion Gone

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-03-30 20:21 UTC

OP

The US stock market wiped out $500 Billion dollars today. You did sell all your goyboxes, didn't you anon?

Early replies (first 3)

62036869
Haha, just kidding. It was actually a $1 Trillion dollars.

62036893
i bought the dip
panicans lose
TTP

62036894
unless you're a day trader none of this matters and even if you're a day trader still none of this matters you will lose your money regardless. fud doesn't work on proper investment strategies. longing the market won game over bye bye pink wojaks farming crypto queer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038473
>>62036908
LMAO

62038644
>>62038287
But muh national security

62038720
>>62037293
we are also living in an era where anyone with a smartphone can be there own broker. kids growing up today are investing into markets which will keep the trend line up more than ever before. compound these facts with rampant consumerism. it's not a good time to be a bear generally speaking

62042487
>>62037625
Do you perhaps work for the Treasury Dept under the Trump administration?
You sound just retarded enough.

62042521
>>62036853
Insanely bullish for gold.

62042954
>>62036869
WHAT THE FUCK 1,000,0000,00000 TRILLONS YOU MEAN? HOW THE FUCK THE FED PRINTED SO MANY FAKE MONEY?? LMFAO

62043042
>>62036869
woooooooow so many zeroes

62043961
>>62036853
I voted for this

62045345
>>62037625
money is a measurement of value, and you can't print value. all this spending and inflation has yet come home to roost

62046233
>>62043042
how much is 1 trillion trillion

62046276
>>62037465
it's funny how ukrainians have such an inflated ego. They kidnap people from the streets to send them to war and they think they can teach america about war? kek

62046618
>>62037465
Our military spending is nothing.
Only 15 cents on every dollar you pay in taxes goes to it.
15 more cents goes to paying interest because our boomer overlords couldn’t balance the budget.
70 cents literally just goes to boomers, through SS, medicaid, etc. (Though there are a few fraudulent outliers like those Somalian daycares.)

Meanwhile in china
Percentages of government spending.
Social Security & Employment: ~15.4%
Education: ~15.1%
Agriculture, Forestry & Water: ~8.2%
Health and Family Planning: ~7.4%
Urban & Rural Community Affairs: ~7.2%
General Public Service: ~7.2%
Science & Technology: ~4.2%
Transportation: ~4.2%
National Defense: ~5.9% (Probably under reported tho)
Interest Payments on Debt: ~4.7%

The fucking Chicom boomers could run our country better than the neoliberal and neoconservative boomers have.

62046627
>>62046618
I will counterpoint that a lot of the stuff on the chinese budget is just jobs programs bullshit make-work.
But it’s still somehow better than the current US setup of 70% (!) retirement home money and the rest is just MIC grift and interest.

62046644
>>62037625
>Just print more money

62046806
>>62037100
When Iran decides its over. They control the Hormuz straight (and soon, the Red Sea), America can't do shit about it, and they aren't in the mood to negotiate because A: They're winning and B: Orange nigger and his mossad buddies use negotiations as an opportunity for assassination perfidy

62047109
>>62036969
you can see where raegan 5x'd the national debt

62047195
>>62046618
You're not seeing the full picture. 60% of industry in China is state-owned, hence industrial spending is represented in government expenditure. But it's the same in United States - the vast majority of "state spending" occurs via the issuance and rehypothecation of public and private credit, enabled by the central bank, which is only nominally independent. The US larps as a free economy when actively it is controlled by banks and corporate interests that tell you that social security is the problem and not the trillions going into their pockets.

62047266
>>62036853
stocks are a bubble and a scam, you don't own anything if you have stocks and you don't finance anything in the economy

62050467
>>62047195
That’s a fair point but banking exists in both systems and they’re different to what i‘m talking about.
The banks, even the state run ones in china, operate on the basis that the money you put in will at least still be there the day after tomorrow.
Taxes have no such basis, you pay them and they’re gone, they aren’t coming back.

But China’s government (tax budget) spending is still technically ~30% of GDP like the US’s.
If the governments are taking the same amount anyways, I would take the chink bridges-to-nowhere tax budget ANYYY day over the USA’s 70% spend on old people, and ““disability”” grifters.

62052384
1.2 TRILLION GONE?????

62052753
>>62036853
Copilot told me to hold my MULL after the earnings call and when the current phase of the Iran war started. Lost so much money, it almost wiped out my previous month's earnings as well, erasing all my milestones. It took a thousand cuts out of nowhere, but I learned about leveraged ETF decay. I thought Copilot helped me, but it turns out telling people to hold is generic advice and just so happened to work initially.

62053333
>>62036908
>remind me in two weeks

62053419
>>62052753
Imagine listening let alone taking the advice of chatbot. Financial advice even. Its just going to pull the top google search result and then shit it out to you in a reddit cool wine aunt looking for updoots format.

62053702
>>62037040
>absolute retard still doing technical analysis in the big 26

62053730
>>62036906
Oh no! Not my savings that I won't cash out for another three decades and by that point this "crash" will barely register as a small blip!

62053780
>>62036908
That's some serious cope, brah.

62053800
>>62046618
>70 cents literally just goes to boomers
>60 cents just to non-whites

62053846
>>62037465
unironically waste is often a direct response to wealth. Budget constraints and resource scarcity force you to come up with interesting and innovative solutions to problems, using as few resources as possible.
When you have what appears to be infinite money, you don't have to be careful with your budget. Lose a radar system worth a billion dollars? Lockheed Martin will make a new one for you lickety-split. See an enemy aircraft? Fire a full salvo of patriot missiles at it, and make sure it comes down. Why not? You've got thousands more in the warehouse.
That's also the reason why they left all that military hardware for the dunecoons to take. It'd be inconvenient to transport and/or store them, and the US can just write a blank check to the military industrial complex to print a thousand more shitty armored humvees for immediately use.

62053912
>>62046618
last time I checked, we spent around 40 billion on energy, and 35 billion of that went to maintaining nuclear weapons.

62053986
>>62036853
>>62036869
>1,000,000,000,000 Trillion

Anyways, I'm tired of explaining economics to you fools. Nothing was "wiped out".

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 212 replies — 22.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 212 • Updated: 2026-03-30 13:49 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62039073
>>62037509
I already did here >>62008295. True Mumbai warrior hand. My fathers name was Kumar, my mothers name was Lakshmi. Pic related. I'm the little prince

62039085
>>62037509
I am now a Vishnu warrior of the blockchain, living in the city of DOT, Mumbai. I run a scam call center, they call me papa Rupee over here. I make many Rupees for many villages. We feed whole of city of DOT, Mumbai. We eat very good. Our bellies are very full.

62040207
>>62039073
>>62039085

Shitposting or on hard drugs constantly?

62040932
>>62040207
I don't get the question? Help me understand what you mean. And thanks for bumping the thread. Gavin Wood, our lord and saviour, will be very pleased with you.

May the blockchain Vishnu be with you good sar

62041893
>>62040932
Read again slowly

62042472
>>62041893
Yea..... You're asking me if I'm shitposting or on hard drugs constantly? That's your question? I can't decipher your half-formed sentences to be honest.

62043369
>>62042472
Simple yes or no

62044274
>>62043369
I can't answer if you can't formulate and define what the question is, right? So, please define the question and then I can answer it

62044411
i'm very sad for this investment

62044561
>>62044411
That sounds really tough my fren. Siddartha Gautama said "Attachment is the root cause of all suffering.". Just practice detachment and sooner or later you'll be able to accept your loss. Maybe even grief it if it's a big loss

62044605
>>62044411
May the Vishnu on the blockchain be with you

62044783
>>62044411
Another thing Siddartha Gautama said is that the only two things you're entitled two in life is suffering and death.

62045355
>>62044561
>>62044605
>>62044783

Not very encouraging to attract new buyers

62045388
>>62045355
Ah. How so?

62045442
>>62045388
Perhaps share influential news

We know DOT is a game changer in the Web world.

62045475
>>62045442
>Perhaps share influential news
Like what?

62045958
>>62045442
100$ end of bull run. Here are some influential news for you

62048109
May Vishnu of the blockchain bless you and bless DOT to 100$.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62048431
At least 119 of 200 posts are by OP. This should violate a rule.

62048708
>>62045475
You mean there are none?
>>62048431
Obamaleaf was worse

62048850
>>62048431
>You mean there are none?
What would you regard as "influential news"?

62048939
>>62048850
What do you think? Can you define influential

62048959
>>62048939
>Can you define influential
No, because it's a subjective word. To some people a towns hall meting of a town of 500 people might be the most "influential" thing in the world since it affect them, their home town and their lives. To someone else it's a completely irrelevant event because it doesn't affect anyone or anything in their own lives. To some people the war in Iran is completely unimportant and doesn't affect them. To some people, like the Iranians is a life changing event.

The word "influential" news is in the perception of the beholder. I can give you as much stuff as you want, it's just... If you don't care about it then it's not "influental", that's why I'm asking
>What would you regard as "influential news"?
Since every individual themselves need to determine what THEY think is influential for them and tickles their funny bone.

62049007
>>62048939
Here, a google definiton; Influential describes
someone or something with the power to cause change, shape decisions, or exert significant impact on people or events. It implies having high status, authority, or being highly important (e.g., an influential leader or book).

62049042
>>62048939
>>62045442
>>62048708
If you can't even define what you want then how can I even give it to you, right? I can only give you something you can actually define.

62049654
>>62048959
>>62049007
>>62049042

You literally shill this fucking coin. Do some influencing

62051513
>>62049654
Yes. Define "influencing". What would INFLUENCE YOU? Naked ladies? Hackatons? Drugs? New technical developments? What influences YOU? If I just post something then you'll be like "No, that's not good enough", so what's the actual point if I can't give you EXACTLY what you want?

62051763
>>62051513
From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight, nope an idiot

62051818
>>62051763
>From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight
You tell me what you think is an "intellectual insight"? What would convince you? Throwing a hissy fit and getting emotional at me doesn't really work...

62052015
>>62051763
I'm not sure if I'm making myself clear enough. Define what you think would constitute for something that YOU consider an "intellectual insight" in your own mind? Can you post a piece of information from another chain that amazed you, that made you think, that made you say "Oh shit, this is lit"? I hope I've made myself clear enough good sar.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

item.title: What the fuck is going on with MSFT? How is this not a great entry? Convince me to not go all in by monday. — 71 replies — 13.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
What the fuck is going on with MSFT? How is this not a great entry? Convince me to not go all in by monday.

Open thread • Replies: 71 • Updated: 2026-03-30 17:48 UTC

OP

What the fuck is going on with MSFT?
How is this not a great entry?
Convince me to not go all in by monday.

Early replies (first 3)

62043952
because the music has stopped

fucking cretin

62043962
Just buy gold and gold mining stocks.

62043971
>>62043947
I would wait until i see signs of of absolute panic.
And even then only go in for a medium term trade.
Liquidity is not great and there are big IPOs coming that will absorb even more of it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62050164
>>62049571
>xbox

holy shit your FA fucking sucks assuming that bullshit even works its a never ending guessing game dont even get me started nigga

sybau no amount of fa that isnt priced it will supersede my PA analysis skills stupid faggot

62050168
you're also forgetting iirc microsoft is one of the largest investors in Open AI lmao

62050173
A shoulder test like that rockets up or down. It's basically a coin flip but the velocity is such it'll snap your neck if you're wrong.
It's not even good for a degenerate gamble because volatility is already elevated past the 95th percentile, so your otm calls/puts can't moon.

62050175
>>62049970
>>62050160
>>62050164
>>62050168

t. jamboy

62050299
>MSAI shitting the bed
>W11 shitting the bed
>365 shitting the bed
>Xbox literally dead not even shitting the bed anymore
Great entry for a short position maybe.

62050512
>>62043947
Is anyone even using Windows for anything other than Claude?

Windows is becoming a Claude browser. You turn on your PC, open claude, and it does everything you used to use Windows for.

Then one day anthropic is going to implement a virtual machine and a file viewer directly into Claude, so you wont ever need to use Windows again.

Its over for microsoft at this point.

62050528
>>62043947
good luck with your jeetsoft

62050538
I boughted a $500 jan/2027 leap at $400
Watch these niggers go bankrupt

62050570
I work as a Dynamics365 software developer. Do you guys think is time to switch to another career?

62050633
>>62043947
Nobody has ever gone broke betting on Microsoft. They are a shit company, but the entire world runs on Excel spreadsheets.

62050873
>>62043947
Just do it. This is a temporary economic crisis almost at the same level as covid. You can set yourself up for a great situation once the dust settles. I was a millionaire after the crash in 2020 because I never stopped my DCA and I loaded up lumps sums of cash into tech stocks and BTC while everyone here was posting pinkjaks.

62050883
>>62043947
Hey, I work at Microsoft as a Senior Data Center Technician. It's an absolute mess. We're have soooo many data centers going up, including an OpenAI project, but with the cracks clearly showing in OpenAI's profitability, as well as Sora getting shut down, there is a lot of tension in the air. We just got a hiring freeze nationwide, if I'm not mistaken. Our network engineers are all outsourced to India. We do not have an on-site NOC at any of our facilities, as far as I'm aware. These street shitter network engineers are completely incompetent and projects drag because of them. In addition, dIvERsiTy iZ oUr StrEngt here, so a lot of new techs we hire are incompetent brown/black trash. One manager just hired his son. I'm probably going to be quitting the data center world once this bubble pops, which is most likely this year.

62051391
>>62043947
Because when you go all in on AI, you lose. Shrimple as.

62051399
Great entry for a short

62051403
>>62050633
No one went broke betting on the turkey before thanksgiving

62051497
>>62043947
the company is jeeted to a point where you have to wonder if they can ever get back from that

62051499
Biz as always, low IQ people blaming everything on indians. Like if MICROSOFT hasn't been shit forever. But now, it's all indians fault. Sure buddies. Fucking retards

62051760
>>62049635
>>62049655
You're burying the lead. The level of goodwill they lost from the Xbone cannot be understated. They were saying insane shit like the kinect would be able to count how many people were in your living room watching a movie, and the rental price would dynamically change to accommodate it. And you wouldnt even be able to lend your game discs out, theyd be hard linked to your console.

Only for Sony to hit the stage at the next E3 and announce a "dynamic" new way to lend your game to friends. Only for one exec to walk up, then cheekily hand his ps4 disc to another exec. And some shit about all processing being handled in "the cloud", which gamers immediately saw through as Oh we wont really own our games theyll be on Microshit's servers forever. It was a fucking debacle all around. Even the price, Xbone was $499, PS4 was $399.

62051770
”we support bipoc trans gamers” - minecraft title screen after jeetsoft acquisition

62051787
>>62043947
In those 3 peaks I see
>exuberance
>metered enthusiasm that is beginning to wane
>desperation
where we are now, it might try to rechallenge the previous high, but it will fall short and then we'll start to see the 'exposé' articles hit the news after it starts plummeting
I have no position in ms, just how I see it going down

62051789
>>62051499

>Microsoft was always a mixed bag
>now there are Indians on top of that

how does this not make sense to you

62051794
The company is failing because it is too jeeted. The cheap labor pumped up the stock to astronomically high levels. But now the effects of that are lowering the value of the company product. So the sock has to go down as investors look to alternatives for better products.

62051822
>>62051497
Usually when the rot (Indians or other nepo groups) gets past a certain points its just irreversibly fucked.
Not a collaspe by any means but just slowly fading into irrelevance and incompetence like the legacy tech companies (IBM, HPE, whatever)

62051849
>>62051822

IBM is the best example. It was huge. America's first premier tech company. It should still be so. But nope. They were the first to take the mass Indianification poison pill, greedy execs looking for cheaper workers, until it backfired and the Indian clan had enough collective power to take it over entirely. Now it's just an eternally irrelevant dinosaur and they squat on the embers collecting whatever spare pennies they can off of it.

62051889
>>62051499
msft was garbage first, but they improved and XP and later Win7 were kinda ok, but then sudenly they started implementing jeets and everything went to shit

62051895
>>62043947
MacroHard gonna pummel Microjeet like a Pajeeta girl on her first night off the plane in Texas getting pounded by big white cock.

62052017
>>62049474
and it still isn’t worth it to use

62052128
>>62043947

It’s because they attached themselves to the hip to openAI. Same as oracle, market knows Altman is a scammer

62053062
>>62048780
Azure is also trash, even open AI is trying to switch to AWS and they opened a law suit against them.

62053066
>>62049594
>They deserve to die for what they did to Halo
This.

item.title: This Iran "war" is just America purposefully reducing China's oil reserves by forcing Iran's hand to block the strait an… — 18 replies — 10.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
This Iran "war" is just America purposefully reducing China's oil reserves by forcing Iran's hand to block the strait an…

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-30 21:26 UTC

OP

This Iran "war" is just America purposefully reducing China's oil reserves by forcing Iran's hand to block the strait and is tactically amazing, ballsy, but also such an asshole selfish move. This coming directly after they kidnapped the Venezuelan president, which was step one. Venezuela has the most untapped oil reserves of any other country and has been purposefully fucked with for decades. Now that the countries has been seized by America and is awaiting a pro-American political puppet AND the Hormuz Strait is now closed, defacto... America is in control of all oil! Asia (China) needs Iran's oil. It's their only way of getting it. Trump has them now by their oily balls.

>current setup:
China controls most mineral deposits
America controls most oil wells

PROVE ME WRONG!

Early replies (first 3)

62053338
>>62053274
China is still buying Iranian oil

62053342
>>62053274
Bullish for uranium and thorium.

62053344
>>62053274
China is exporting oil so this isn’t true.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62053347
>>62053338
Cope

62053354
>>62053344
Retard

62053356
>>62053274
China is the only country still getting oil out of the Persian Gulf. Good job, retard lmao.

62053362
America can't shit on China the way you're talking about because there's a country named Japan and this country called Japan holds trillions of US Debt. This county named Japan is also struggling with inflation for the first time in many many years. This country named Japan is an industrial nation that makes things with oil they buy from the gulf.

If this country known as Japan is sufficiently threatened with increased input costs its export driven economy will speculatively drive its currency even weaker. Because this country you may not have heard of called Japan is sitting at over 200% debt to gdp ratio they can't really afford that. So to keep their currency from going to shit trying to control their bond yield curve they would have to liquidate US debt.

As I'm sure you're famliar with the United States of America I won't walk you through why Japan liquidating US debt is bad for the US. This is strategically why what you're talking about is not the US strategy at all.

62053367
>>62053274
It's pretty obvious, the big oil companies specifically said that the price of oil is too low to make developing venezuela viable. So he had to make the price go up.

62053374
>>62053362
Japan won't do shit, they will get bailed out by the fed and even if they dont usa has a 3rd bomb ready

62053400
>>62053354
Says the child who made this thread to cope in his delusion. This Epstein war has done nothing to impact China’s oil trade.

62053410
>>62053374
Japan will do shit which is why the treasury has rate checked already once this year to tamp the usd/yen ratio back down.

62053414
>>62053400
Im not op and also, I accept your concession

62053457
>>62053338
>>62053344
>>62053356
>>62053362
>>62053367

62053877
>>62053274
the strait is only closed to american and american allied vessels
>China is an american ally
whew lads, you dont know what biz will come up with these days

62054036
>>62053274
unfortunately there was no plan, no strategic vision, and this is cope

62054183
>>62053274
>goys this has nothing to do with israel
kys, retarded OP

62054227
>>62053274
Oy vey, short term pain for long term gain goyim!

62054297
this >>62053274 is the kind of retards that visit this board.
think about it next time you read "advice" from some TA faggot or whatever.

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-03-30 21:30 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62053644
>>62053587

62053647
fuck shkreli more than anything

saylor will be the first trillionaire

62053648
>>62053587
Or usurious bank yields are really that predatory these days in comparison

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62053660
>>62053587
>11% yield is crazy
Kikes tell you only 3-4% is possible with savings accounts because they are RIPPING YOU OFF they profit at least 2-3x more than that usually way more. They take the goyims money and go in with leverage

62053703
> brace

62053779
>>62053660
Let the Goyim deal with 3 to 4%

62053849
>>62053647
Benjamin's video on Shkreli changed my tune about him, and I think it's a pretty fair, thorough case study.

62053854
>>62053648
Seriously, what banks are doing to people with 0% interest on cash and criminal rates for loans is far more egregious than what Saylor is doing.

Why do you think the banks lobbied so hard against the CLARITY Act allowing yield on stablecoins? They're weeing themselves at the prospective of alternatives to their scams. Just imagine how much could potentially flow into crypto once the dam breaks.

62054079
it's an awful sign that someone like Saylor is posting AI generated porn talking about 11% yield.

62054102
>>62053647
Shkreli is one the greatest American heroes of the 2010s.

62054117
>>62054102
Go back to Albania, Marty

62054141
>>62053849
give me a rundown

62054185
>>62053587
if even shkreli knows its a scam we're FUCKED

62054251
>>62054141

item.title: RTO is being pushed at my job. 2 days a week in a city relatively far from me (2 hour commute). Should I rent a small st… — 47 replies — 5.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
RTO is being pushed at my job. 2 days a week in a city relatively far from me (2 hour commute). Should I rent a small st…

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-30 14:34 UTC

OP

RTO is being pushed at my job. 2 days a week in a city relatively far from me (2 hour commute).
Should I rent a small studio apartment or should I take the bus? I'd have to waste about 13% of my wage (more for a bigger one).

Early replies (first 3)

62042819
>>62042805
I quit when they rtod 5 days a week with nothing lined up planning to do a year sabbatical. I had a recruiter already reach out and I am barely halfway through my sabbatical. Not sure why I am even following through

62042861
>>62042819
I could quit today if I wanted to, but I'd have to take a much lower pay, like a 30% cut or more if I got another job. I get messages from recruiters all the time, and I do apply from time to time, but so far no one has hired me, and they are all RTOing anyway...

62042866
>>62042805
Try the bus but I can almost guarantee that you you won't be able to stand it unless (desu even if) you can fall asleep easily on it and/or have a good way to occupy your time.

Keep in mind that finding a place takes its own commute. If you can dip from work early to attend a showing, that saves you the time and money of riding/driving in on your day off.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62044622
>>62043920
everyone knows people are slacking off at home and only do the bare minimum. thats fine and you cant expect more than that from a regular employee desu but some retards go to far with it and pretty much do zero work which fucks up the deal for everyone else.

62044655
>>62042902
>hurr durr im so special and critical
They could replace you in a week and they’d murder your entire family in front of you to make more profit.

62044695
>>62044622
The people that slack off at home are the same people that slack off in the office.

62044716
>>62044695
thats true but these are usually the first ones who quit once they have to go back to office. seen that more than enough in my work place.

62044722
>>62043682
This is the only answer, all the other wagies that gave up on WFH and willingly returned to the office deserve the humiliation they get.

62044741
>Work for Nordic company
>CEO decides 3 day RTO
>They talk highly about the benefits of going to the office, after bragging about the benefits of WFH during covid
>They started tracking units first on adherence
>Now they are tracking individually
>Your boss follows this up and you even have an app to plan and track it yourself
>At the same time we are cutting costs, so traveling is highly restricted
>This especially goes out on those working in cross border teams
>Some have no team in their office, so they come to the office, punch in their card and go home to work again
>People are pissed and calling out the bullshit and how we are treated like kids
>Now most meetings are about this topic
>Probably millions are being wasted on this

Honestly what a shitshow.

62044775
I simply quit the day I'm told to get back into an office.
Simple as fucking that.

62044791
You WFH fags did this to yourselves. It wasn't 1-2% of people during COVID, it was 30-40% of you dickheads that were actively fucking off at home FOR FUCKING YEARS. You fags got years at home to fuck off. People abused bennies, WFH, COVIDbucks, stimmies, and now the pendulum is swinging back. Get fucked lol. All the people that worked jobs that never allowed for WFH are laughing at you dipshits right now, just like how you were laughing at wagies during COVID while you sat at home in your PJs the entire fucking day.

t. wagie who never got a single stimmie check and never did WFH a day in my life

62044845
>>62044791
Sound like you’re just envious of a scenario that you have fabricated in your head. I manage a remote team and across our company the remote teams consistently outperform the handful of in office or hybrid teams. The truth is that once you stop limiting yourself to a physical location for hiring, the talent pool explodes.

62044878
>>62044845


In your example I'm sure you are correct. It's just that middle managers everywhere saw how much fucking off people were doing and now are convinced that WFH requires in person babysitting for a few days a week and I don't see that changing. My job pays me to travel, something WFH by definition would exclude. In my opinion that is missing out. But hey whenever makes you happy.

62045083
>>62044205
6 hours of commuting a week in total. Similar to people who commute every day 30 to 40 minutes. I think it is worth it compared to moving to the city or finding a job where I live that will pay a fraction of what I make.
>>62044791
You should be thankful how remote workers significantly reduce traffic during rush hour. I actually felt how commutes became worse as companies started demanding RTO. Fuck off you short sided seething prick.

62045322
>>62043682
I only go to the office once per month on the condition that my employer pays the plane ticket

62045520
>>62044791
And you probably never worked in a fucking office and have no clue how shitty it is to work in an open office or being surrounded by retards

62045569
>>62045083


I'm not a city slicker faggot like you lmao. My commute for the last 3 years has been 15 minutes to and from work. If you have a shitty commute, change jobs and/or move. But no, so many of you retarded faggots are absolutely against living and working outside the big city.

>>62045520

>OHH MY GOD IM WORKING INDOORS ALL DAY IM GOING INSAAAANE

I don't disagree with you, open office sounds awful. You. Picked. An. Office job lmao. You will get no sympathy from tradie wagies. Would you rather be doused in diesel fuel, ruin your back and knees, or shovel shit? Nah so please shut the fuck up. WFH is a luxury most working people will never see. And you guys let too many retards abuse it.

62045597
Fuck.
Depressing reading this thread

62045687
>>62045569
>>OHH MY GOD IM WORKING INDOORS ALL DAY
Showing your ignorance once again. Ask me how I know you've never worked an intellectual job in your life...

62045736
>>62045569
Loser pos subhuman suburban ruralfag garbage.

62045740
>>62045569
Subhuman wagie sybau

62045748
>>62045569
WE WILL NOT LET A SUBHUMAN RURALFAG BLUE COLLAR POS TALK SHIT ABOUT US

62047733
>>62045687

>you've never worked an intellectual job in your life

Correct.

62047817
IMHO if you are making good money, just swallow the RTO pill and deal with it.

62047903
>>62047817
Good money meaning $300k/yr here, yes?

62048158
>>62047903
in my id say anything over 200k is worth going to war for (returning to office) in this economy

62049605
>>62047817
>just swallow the RTO pill and deal with it.
OP here. did you even read my post? I never said I wouldn't, I asked what to do.

62051735
>>62047817
>>62047903
>>62048158
My company is starting on this nonsense. So I'll probably try to find a new job and hoping to go from 150k to 200k. Even that hardly seems worth it for 2 hours of driving daily.

>>62042805
2 hours total or each way?
You should probably either get a new job or move closer because they will not stop at 2 days.

62051755
Get back in the office wagies hahahahaha
You will never know what it feels like to live as a neet again

62051911
>>62042805
Still 100% remote WFH here. European Bank. Cybersecurity.

62051923
>>62051735
Spoiled cunt. 99% of humans alive would kill for $200k a year.
Like literally work as a hired killer.

62051930
>>62047817
no.

62052218
>>62051923
99% of humans are brown and stupid.
>be paid killer
>get caught
>spend life in jail
>ah shieet
A 50k increase would be 25k after taxes. Then deduct 70 cents per mile for driving 2 hours per day, 14k.
That leaves 10k left over. So you commute with the other wages for the equivalent of $20 an hour.

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 83 replies — 5.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 83 • Updated: 2026-03-30 07:31 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62034164
>>62033492
how can u retire with 200k lmao

62034249
>>62034164
>>62034164
That's enough if I was alone.
The FIRE safe withdrawal rate is 4% (although my main non-crypto investment has been doing 6-8% annually since 2018).

4% of 200k is 8000, which is 666 usd per month.
Just retire to a 3rd world country.
I used to rent a tiny 20sqm studio here for like 100 usd per month, and I would eat at street food places like pic related for $1 to $1.50 per meal Ate twice a day, paid $20 monthly for internet, just played or watched series movies and anime on my phone all day.

And ice here is like $25 to $35 a gram.
I actually lived that lifestyle for like 3 years, it was okay.

62034517
>>62034164
>Live with family
>No car no buy
That simple, I basically have to scrape together a couple hundred a month and I'm good.
And yes I can do it forever and never get kicked out.
I picked 200,000 because the official number is 150k if we factor in an average stock market growth, but I wanted a little cushion. In reality I'm gonna be doing some part-time work on the side so I wouldn't even be touching said most time, I don't really consider picking fruit at my uncle's farm for a couple hours "work."

My monthly expenses are probably 600 dollars or less.
>>62034249
Yeah I could go overseas too but I just live with family and basically have this life already.
It's actually crazy how cheap living is when you don't have a car or house payment, like I only work now to stack up money for future-proofing stuff. The cost is similar to having 3 roommates in a low cost of living area.

62034533
>>62034249
nigga my idea of retirement isnt living in a 3rd world country like the rest of you animals


i want a fucking bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms and importantly, in a first world country with fast internet

jesus you people are pathetic


>i want to retire at 27 so i can live like a poorfag in thailand

62034841
>>62034533
>i want a fucking bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms and importantly, in a first world country with fast internet
>jesus you people are patheti
ngmi

62035727
>>62034533
>you people are pathetic
Says the guy down to 200k to the person who is actually retired from the 2018 bullrun
>bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms
What for? I live right in the city, everything is walking distance. I have hired help that comes over to clean when I want them to, my laundry gets picked up and delivered to me, I don't need many rooms or a car, everything is walking distance.
Even several asian massage parlors are walking distance, I can get head or full service from hot asian girls while high, all within my budget
>fast internet
I can stream 4k, what else do you need?

>live like a poorfag
Hell nah.
I was just saying how you can make 200k work.
But personally I barely spend like $40k a year even though I can afford much more, and already live like a king compared to the locals here. Back when I was more of a stoner I was stoned 24/7 and it doesn't even make a dent in my budget.

62038112
>>62035727
>just retire so you can live impoverished in a 3rd world nation

man shut the fuck up

62038131
>>62024612
if youre taking xanax and accepting the shitty side effects (impaired math and decision making ability) just to balance out the stimulants, youre rapidly approaching rock bottom. voices should have been your sign. get off the drugs. memantine can block the effects of stimulants and make them less euphoric if you want to disincentivize yourself

62038628
>>62038112
>impoverished
Frame it however you want.
I'm living better than I've ever been ever in my life.
Been retired since 2018.
You're the one crying you're down to less than half your port lmao

I just suggested the expat lifestyle, don't see why you need to keep shitting on it if you don't think it's for you.

Man I haven't posted in biz in like 2 years, I only take a peek every 1-2 months for a tiny bit, only posted in this thread expecting to talk about meth, but whatever man. Glad to see it's still the same bitter people
I'm out, I have no stress in my life, I'm just living the life enjoying drugs, hoes, and retirement, I don't need stress from some rando online no thank you

62041625
>>62038628
how else would u describe it?

let me put it to you this way

i dont dream of living like a poor person in a third world country

why the FUCK would i wanna do that for the rest of my life?

62042997
>>62033249
>>62038628
woah wait bro come back, ill send you a pic of my stash noooo I have kurobaex too D:

62043010
>>62038628
>>62041625
BROTHERS WE ALL EAT METH. WE NEED TO BIND TOGETHER STOP FIGHTING. STOP IT.

>>62033249
>I've tried 20-50mg in a capsule, but it didn't start feeling good until like 60-80mg+

Brother I guarantee you 1000% you have some unpure stuff. 50mg sent me to the ER and they had to pump me with Ativan. There is no shot you did 120mg and "only then did it feel it hit hard", you would've been coughing from your heart trying to do self-cpr because of the severe arrythmia you'd have

psychonaut says oral meth 50mg at 100% purity is considered like... MAX dose. yes there's no "MAX" since you get tolerance but that is still just genuinely a very very large dose beyond recreational. the truth is you cannot extract full "recreational value" from oral meth because it works like vyvanse or adderall XR; the increase in dopamine is still fucking nutty but its GRADUAL.

62043015
>>62041625
>why the FUCK would i wanna do that for the rest of my life?
the point he's making is cost of living arbitrage. and it may have better "value" even if it is technically worse. because you're paying $10 for 80 value vs $100 for 100 value.

62043019
>mfw were taking financial advice from a bunch of schizophrenic tweakers

62043026
>>62024567
>Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH
I did that sober. Don't need no meth to buy some ETH, heh.

62043031
>>62043026
>p00rfugg id
Heh.

62043034
>>62043019
meth use = gains
this is financial advice

62043095
>>62043026
>>62043031
that has to be one of the best thread IDs i've seen lol
>>62043019
nigger we only eat it, wait im not sure about "AsBpaAJT"/"v4UPS/8N" but 2 of us only eat it so not traditional tweakers. you know only 3% of meth users eat it right heheheh. consider us the JEWS of the meth world (elite).

seriously though >>62043034 is correct

62043098
>>62043095
>tweakers
that being said I understand the irony of this considering I crashed out and there is history of it right here in this thread. now I look retarded

62043368
>>62024595
It's best to not even start OP because then you because a whiny sanctimonious old cunt like this for life telling stories no one cares to hear to go along with his equally unsolicited advice. It's either that or you become religious which is just as gay. Steer clear OP!

62043509
>>62043015
except youre living impoverished in a third world nation...

62043530
>>62024567
>assisted euthanasia pods
>Should be manditory for drug users.

62043547
>>62024669
>>62025279
What the fuck is going on with MSFT?
How is this not a great entry?

62043801
>>62043547
might actually slurp this

62043978
>>62043547
Apple is eating their lunch

62043979
i did meth once in bangkok in 2016 while staying in the flat of a shemale

it was my first time but i smoked 8-10 puffs of crystal meth i was thinking its like weed

i got very horny after that but i couldnt get hard so i sucked her for one hour, she was even recording me

the next 3 days traumatized me as i was alone in bangkok heat with paranoia and hallucinations

woke up the 4th day (after 3 days without sleep) on the floor of the bathroom of a luxury condo near thong lor and a cockroach was running near my face

i felt sick for one week after that and went back home buying a new ticket

would i do it again?


hmmmm may be just one puff

62046039
>>62025279
I hit a clean 10x on Siren, rolled it into BTC, and now it’s chilling on Babylon. Self-custody intact, earning on the side.

Digital gold, anon.

62046898
Opiates are better

62047562
>>62043979
>i got very horny after that but i couldnt get hard so i sucked her for one hour, she was even recording me
lol

62051156
>>62046898
false

62038696
She is so beautiful without make up, i want the dick in the puss now, and white fluid deep in the opening, and stream them to the entire word to withness the process.

62038753

62048169
>>62036974
if you treat them like an actual 100% girl they will let you do anything to them. And you can nut in them all day with no pregnancy.

62048220
>>62036590
13yo boys should not dress like that

Buy land

62048243
>>62036590
You selling him? I might be interested...

62048262
>>62036590
no, mam. and I dont have the key to those toy handcuffs you got yourself into. find your way out of them, like youll find your way out of my hotel room. thanks.

62048265
>>62036590
i can't, because i sold in January even though the FAGGOTS on this board told me i was a retard for doing so. guess i'm not so retarded now!

62048316
>>62048265
kek

62050625
Y'all niggas gay

62050699
>>62048262
U gay or something?

62050736
>>62036590

62050910

62051124
>>62037003

62051177

62051223

62051224

.
.

item.title: Why is the price of oil still going up? Shouldn’t it be back to $90 after 20 tankers were confirmed by POTUS? It’s climb… — 9 replies — 4.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why is the price of oil still going up? Shouldn’t it be back to $90 after 20 tankers were confirmed by POTUS? It’s climb…

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-30 20:55 UTC

OP

Why is the price of oil still going up? Shouldn’t it be back to $90 after 20 tankers were confirmed by POTUS? It’s climbing past $104 without any resistance.

Early replies (first 3)

62054029
Those were Pakistani tankers

62054043
>>62053985
Just wait until the shortage reaches the end of the supply chain.

62054051
>>62053985

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62054059
>>62053985
I voted for this

62054065
>>62054051
libtards will follow the words and advice of terrorists who murdered millions of their own people because "OrAnGE mAn bAd"

62054110
>>62054065

62054128
>>62053985

62054144
>>62054065

62054156
>>62054065

item.title: ETH so dead they make you watch ads to cover gas fees now — 19 replies — 4.0/hr

ETH so dead they make you watch ads to cover gas fees now

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-03-30 18:22 UTC

OP

ETH so dead they make you watch ads to cover gas fees now

Early replies (first 3)

62049114
>>62049101
A swap is 10c on mainnet, I have screenshots with 200eth burn/minute, but that was 5 years ago.

62049167
>>62049101
a single tx is 0.7c(high prio) even an indian like OP could easily afford it.

62049220
>>62049101
Kek holy shit what wallet?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62049802
>>62049101
$6 in 7 minutes is good pay but the humiliation is not worth it

62049869
>>62049101

62049929
>>62049101
RESUME VIEWING

RESUME VIEWING

RESUME VIEWING

62049939
>>62049101
You can get paid $53.91 an hour to watch ads.

62050055
>>62049101
is this real? it would be metamask (or whatever wallet that is) doing it

62050310
>>62049802
>>62049939
Maybe I should buy a bunch of smartphones and service and just train an AI to watch ads all day.

62050360
>>62049114
most bizraelis don't know how blockchains and fee markets and emission schedules and wallets actually work. this is a forum for low information speculators who leave everything on an exchange all the time

62050381
7 fucking minutes?

62050576
>7 minutes of ads
>more ads than i've seen in a decade as a ublock origin chad
i'd rather peel off my fingernails

62050594
>>62049939
is it really paying out money though?

62050657
>>62049101

Just close this shithole already.

62052099
>>62050657

>remember it from reddit
yikes

62052111

62052596

7 MINUTES IS ALL I CAN SPARE TO PLAY WITH YOU CHRIS

62052632
>>62049101

62053235

what Ethereum is to Bitcoin
